23.reason: Loop does not process the last character; should be i < strlen(str). Also, when i=0, if str[0]=='-', access str[-1] is undefined.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  The loop condition should be i < strlen(str) to process all characters including the last one; also, when i=0, str[i-1] accesses out-of-bounds memory.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  The loop condition should be i < strlen(str) to process all characters including the last one; also, when i=0, accessing str[i-1] is out of bounds.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Loop condition should be i < strlen(str) to include the last character; also i=0 causes out-of-bounds access to str[i-1] later.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Loop does not process the last character; should be i < strlen(str). Also, when i=0, if str[0]=='-', access str[-1] is undefined.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Starting at i=0 causes out-of-bounds access to str[i-1]; loop condition strlen(str)-2 causes unsigned integer underflow for short strings and omits the last character from output.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The loop bound `strlen(str)-2` causes the last character to be omitted from output and triggers unsigned underflow if string length < 2; starting at i=0 also risks out-of-bounds access for str[i-1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition stops too early; last character never printed if not part of expansion]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition stops too early; last character never printed when no expansion occurs at the end]

24.reason: When i=0, str[i-1] is out-of-bounds; also, the condition should check i>0 before accessing str[i-1].

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  When i=0, str[i-1] is out-of-bounds; also, the condition should check i>0 before accessing str[i-1].
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  When i=0, str[i-1] accesses str[-1] which is out of bounds. Also, the condition should check i>0 before accessing str[i-1].
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing check i>0; when i=0, str[i-1] is out of bounds.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing boundary checks i>0 and i<strlen(str)-1 leads to undefined behavior when accessing str[i-1] at i=0.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing boundary checks (i>0 && i<strlen(str)-1) causes out-of-bounds array access for str[i-1] when i=0 and str[i+1] when i is the last index
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accesses str[i-1] when i=0, causing out-of-bounds read]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accesses str[i-1] when i=0, causing out-of-bounds read]
